# Branch Pizza

> Sunbury's award-winning pizzeria since 1977. Hand-crafted pizzas, our signature crisped pepperoni-cup pies, fresh-made knots, wings, subs and a full bar, right on the square in downtown Sunbury.

## Business facts
- Business: Branch Pizza
- Location: Sunbury, OH
- Phone: (740) 965-3383
- Service area: Sunbury, OH, Delaware County, OH
- Rating: 4.5 stars (172 reviews)
- Hours: Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday: 11:00-21:00 | Friday: 11:00-22:00 | Saturday: 16:00-22:00 | Sunday, Monday: 16:00-21:00

## Key pages
- https://branchpizza.com/
- https://branchpizza.com/menu/
- https://branchpizza.com/about/
- https://branchpizza.com/contact/
- https://branchpizza.com/privacy/

## Common questions
- What are Branch Pizza’s hours? We’re open Monday 4-9pm, Tuesday through Thursday 11am-9pm, Friday 11am-10pm, Saturday 4-10pm, and Sunday 4-9pm.
- Where is Branch Pizza located? We’re right on the square in downtown Sunbury at 34 S Vernon St, Sunbury, OH 43074.
- Can I order Branch Pizza online? Yes. Order directly through our online menu for pickup, or call us at (740) 965-3383.
- What is Branch Pizza known for? We’ve been Sunbury’s pizzeria since 1977 and were voted Grubhub’s best in town two years running. We’re famous for our signature crisped pepperoni-cup pies, made-from-scratch dough and sauce, and our garlic knots.
- Does Branch Pizza have gluten-free crust? Yes, most of our pizzas are available on a 12″ cauliflower crust, and you can build your own gluten-free pie.

## Contact
Call (740) 965-3383 for more information.
